title: Prismata Post-Game Commentary - Phase 1 Structured Output
description: Schema for the structured data produced by Phase 1 of the post-game commentary pipeline. Validates replay analysis output including per-turn buys, eval data, AI comparison, and precomputed narrative hints.

code.description: Replay code (e.g. FxCfR-K49T+). May contain alphanumeric characters, hyphens, plus signs, at signs, etc.

players.description: Exactly 2 player objects, index 0 (P1) and index 1 (P2).

winner.description: Index of the winning player (0 or 1).

total_rounds.description: Total number of full rounds played.

game_characteristics.description: High-level game metadata for commentary framing.

length_category.description: Game length bucket for commentary tone adjustment.

is_upset.description: True if the lower-rated player won.

rating_diff.description: Absolute rating difference between the two players.

biggest_eval_swing.description: Largest single-turn eval swing in the game. Optional: absent in validate mode (no eval data).

random_set.description: The random units available in the game set (typically 8-11 units).

cost.description: Cost string (digits=gold, G=green, B=blue, C=red/attack, H=energy). E.g. 12GGGB.

hp.description: Hit points. 0 for tech buildings and similar non-combat units.

build_time.description: Construction time in turns. 0 means the unit is available immediately.

fragile.description: True if the unit has the Fragile keyword.

abilities.description: Text description of the unit abilities. May be empty string for passive units.

supply.description: Number of copies available to each player.

deck_units.description: All unit names in the full deck (base set + random set). Base set has 11 units, so minimum 11.

turns.description: Per-ply turn records. One entry per half-turn (player action).

ply.description: 1-based half-turn index across the entire game.

turn_in_round.description: 1 = first player turn in this round, 2 = second player turn.

buys.description: List of unit display names purchased this turn.

eval_pct.description: Neural net eval as percentage (0-100 from P1 perspective). Optional: absent when has_eval is false.

eval_raw.description: Raw neural net eval output. Optional: absent when has_eval is false.

eval_delta.description: Change in eval_pct from previous ply. Optional: absent when has_eval is false.

ai_buys.description: What the AI would have bought this turn. Optional: absent when has_ai is false.

ai_agrees.description: True if the AI recommended buys match the player actual buys. Optional: absent when has_ai is false.

click_count.description: Total click actions this turn (buys + abilities + other).

undo_count.description: Number of undo (revert) clicks this turn.

abilities_used.description: Display names of units whose abilities were activated this turn.

data_quality.description: Metadata about the quality and completeness of the analysis data.

has_eval.description: True if neural net eval data is present in turns.

has_ai.description: True if AI comparison data (ai_buys, ai_agrees) is present in turns.

stepper_reliable.description: True if the replay stepper successfully applied a high percentage of clicks.

stepper_total_clicks.description: Total clicks in the replay commandList.

stepper_applied_clicks.description: Number of clicks the stepper successfully applied.

mode.description: Pipeline mode: analyze = full (eval + AI), eval-only = eval without AI search, validate = parse-only (no eval or AI).

notes.description: Free-form notes about data quality issues encountered.

precomputed.description: Precomputed narrative hints derived from turn data. Saves the LLM from doing arithmetic.

agreement_rate.description: Fraction of turns where ai_agrees is true. Optional: present only when has_ai is true.

biggest_mistake.description: The single largest eval drop by either player. Optional: present only when has_eval is true.

eval_drop.description: Magnitude of the eval drop (always positive).

max_eval_swing.description: Largest absolute eval_delta across all turns. Optional: present only when has_eval is true.

top_eval_swings.description: Top eval swings sorted by magnitude. Optional: present only when has_eval is true.

delta.description: Signed eval delta (negative = bad for that player).

turning_point_candidates.description: Candidate turning points for the LLM to consider when structuring commentary. Different reasons carry different extra fields.

ply.description: The ply where this turning point occurs.

reason.description: Category of turning point. Known values: largest_eval_drop, eval_swing, first_attacker_buy, burst_buy_spike, ai_disagreement_cluster. Extensible.

magnitude.description: Present for largest_eval_drop and eval_swing reasons.

player.description: Player index, if applicable to this turning point.

unit_knowledge.description: Mapping of unit display name to a short strategy snippet for the LLM. Covers all units that appear in the game random set.
